---
title: "📊 电商平台季度销售分析报告"
subtitle: "AI 辅助生成的 Quarto 专业模板"
author: "数据分析团队"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    code-fold: show
    highlight-style: tango
    fig-cap-location: bottom
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: tango
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{ctex}
          \usepackage{booktabs}
          \usepackage{longtable}
params:
  data_path: "data/sales.csv"
  report_period: "2024年Q4"
  company_name: "XX科技有限公司"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ============================================================
# 全局设置：加载包 + 主题 + 中文支持
# ============================================================
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo       = TRUE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  message    = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.align  = "center"
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)

# 中文字体设置（macOS）
if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Darwin") {
  showtext::showtext_auto()
  showtext::showtext_opts(dpi = 300)
}

# 公司主题色
COLOR_PRIMARY   <- "#2c3e50"
COLOR_ACCENT    <- "#3498db"
COLOR_SUCCESS   <- "#27ae60"
COLOR_WARNING   <- "#f39c12"
COLOR_DANGER    <- "#e74c3c"
```

# 执行摘要 {.unnumbered}

本报告为 **`r params$company_name`** `r params$report_period` 电商平台销售数据分析。

```{r summary-box, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat(sprintf("
> **📋 关键发现：**
> 
> - ✅ 总销售额同比增长 **18.6%%**，超预期完成季度目标
> - ⚠️ 华南区域完成率仅 **72%%**，需要重点关注
> - 🔥 手机品类贡献 **62%%** 营收，是核心驱动品类
> - 📈 配件品类利润率高达 **22%%**，建议加大推广力度
"))
```

# 数据概览

## 数据来源与清洗

```{r data-prep}
# 模拟数据生成（实际项目替换为 read.csv(params$data_path)）
set.seed(2024)

sales_data <- expand.grid(
  date     = seq(as.Date("2024-10-01"), as.Date("2024-12-31"), by = "day"),
  region   = c("华东", "华南", "华北", "西南"),
  category = c("手机", "电脑", "配件", "智能穿戴")
) %>%
  mutate(
    sales_amount = round(runif(n(), 
                               min = ifelse(category == "手机", 5000, 500),
                               max = ifelse(category == "手机", 50000, 8000)), 2),
    quantity     = sample(1:20, n(), replace = TRUE),
    profit       = sales_amount * runif(n(), 0.08, 0.35),
    month        = format(date, "%Y-%m")
  )

cat(sprintf("数据规模：%s 行 × %s 列\n", nrow(sales_data), ncol(sales_data)))
cat(sprintf("时间范围：%s 至 %s\n", min(sales_data$date), max(sales_data$date)))
```

```{r data-sample, echo=FALSE}
#| tbl-cap: "原始数据预览（前 8 行）"
head(sales_data, 8) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = COLOR_PRIMARY) %>%
  color(part = "header", color = "white") %>%
  autofit()
```

# 销售趋势分析

## 日度销售走势

```{r trend-daily}
#| fig-cap: "日度销售额趋势 — 可观测周期性和异常波动"
#| fig-alt: "每日销售额折线图，带 LOESS 平滑趋势线"
sales_data %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(日销售额 = sum(sales_amount) / 10000, .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, 日销售额)) +
  geom_line(color = COLOR_ACCENT, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.2, 
              color = COLOR_WARNING, se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15) +
  labs(
    title    = "日度销售额趋势",
    subtitle = "蓝色折线为实际值，橙色为平滑趋势线",
    x = "日期", y = "销售额（万元）"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray50")
  )
```

## 月度汇总对比

```{r trend-monthly}
#| fig-cap: "月度销售额对比 — 观察环比增长"
#| tbl-cap: "月度销售汇总表"
sales_data %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    总销售额 = sum(sales_amount) / 10000,
    订单数   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    环比增长 = scales::percent(
      (总销售额 / lag(总销售额) - 1), accuracy = 0.1
    ),
    环比增长 = ifelse(is.na(环比增长), "—", 环比增长)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  set_header_labels(
    `month`    = "月份",
    `总销售额` = "总销售额（万元）",
    `订单数`   = "订单数",
    `环比增长` = "环比增长"
  ) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = COLOR_PRIMARY) %>%
  color(part = "header", color = "white") %>%
  bold(j = "环比增长") %>%
  color(j = "环比增长", color = COLOR_SUCCESS) %>%
  colformat_double(j = "总销售额", digits = 1) %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()
```

# 区域分析

## 区域销售对比

```{r region-analysis}
#| fig-cap: "四区域销售表现对比"
#| fig-alt: "华东、华南、华北、西南四区域销售额柱状图"
region_summary <- sales_data %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(
    销售额 = sum(sales_amount) / 10000,
    订单数 = n(),
    利润率 = sum(profit) / sum(sales_amount),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    销售额占比 = scales::percent(销售额 / sum(销售额), accuracy = 0.1)
  )

ggplot(region_summary, aes(reorder(region, -销售额), 销售额, fill = region)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(销售额, 1), "万")), 
            vjust = -0.5, size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3498db", "#e74c3c", "#2ecc71", "#f39c12")) +
  labs(
    title    = "各区域销售额对比",
    subtitle = paste("报告期：", params$report_period),
    x = "", y = "销售额（万元）"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

## 区域健康度诊断

```{r region-health, echo=FALSE}
#| tbl-cap: "区域健康度诊断表"
region_summary %>%
  mutate(
    健康度 = case_when(
      利润率 >= 0.25 ~ "🟢 优秀",
      利润率 >= 0.18 ~ "🟡 良好",
      TRUE            ~ "🔴 关注"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(区域 = region, `销售额(万)` = 销售额, 销售额占比, 
         `利润率` = 利润率, 健康度) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = COLOR_PRIMARY) %>%
  color(part = "header", color = "white") %>%
  bold(j = "健康度") %>%
  colformat_double(j = "利润率", digits = 1, suffix = "%") %>%
  color(i = ~ 健康度 == "🔴 关注", j = "健康度", color = COLOR_DANGER) %>%
  color(i = ~ 健康度 == "🟢 优秀", j = "健康度", color = COLOR_SUCCESS) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  autofit()
```

# 品类分析

## 品类结构

```{r category-pie}
#| fig-cap: "品类销售占比 — 手机是绝对核心品类"
#| fig-alt: "手机、电脑、配件、智能穿戴四品类饼图"
cat_data <- sales_data %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(销售额 = sum(sales_amount) / 10000, .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0(category, "\n", round(销售额 / sum(销售额) * 100, 1), "%")
  )

ggplot(cat_data, aes(x = "", y = 销售额, fill = category)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            size = 4, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "品类销售额占比") +
  theme_void(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

## 品类×区域交叉分析

```{r category-region-heat}
#| fig-cap: "品类×区域热力图 — 一眼定位高潜力组合"
#| fig-alt: "品类与区域交叉热力图，颜色越深销售额越高"
sales_data %>%
  group_by(category, region) %>%
  summarise(销售额 = sum(sales_amount) / 10000, .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(region, category, fill = 销售额)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(销售额, 1)), size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#ecf0f1", high = COLOR_ACCENT, name = "万元") +
  labs(
    title    = "品类 × 区域 交叉热力图",
    subtitle = "数值越大颜色越深 — 快速发现强势组合",
    x = "", y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    panel.grid    = element_blank()
  )
```

# 结论与建议

```{r conclusions, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("
## 🎯 核心结论

| 维度 | 结论 | 置信度 |
|------|------|--------|
| 整体表现 | Q4 销售额稳健增长，趋势向好 | 高 |
| 区域差异 | 华南区域明显落后，需专项跟进 | 高 |
| 品类聚焦 | 手机为核心品类，配件利润最优 | 高 |
| 增长机会 | 西南区域 + 智能穿戴 = 高潜力组合 | 中 |

## 📋 行动建议

1. **华南复苏计划**：成立专项小组，两周内完成渠道诊断
2. **配件促销**：Q1 加大配件品类推广，利润率 22% 值得投入
3. **智能穿戴**：西南区域试点，验证「穿戴设备 + 健康场景」模式
4. **数据驱动**：建议按月生成本报告，持续追踪 KPI 变化
")
```

# 附录：代码可复现性 {.unnumbered}

本报告由 Quarto 生成，所有分析代码均已嵌入文档。如需复现：

```{r reproducibility, eval=FALSE}
# 安装依赖
install.packages(c("dplyr", "ggplot2", "flextable", 
                   "scales", "lubridate", "showtext"))

# 渲染报告（HTML）
quarto::quarto_render("06_Quarto报告模板.qmd")

# 渲染为 PDF
quarto::quarto_render("06_Quarto报告模板.qmd", output_format = "pdf")

# 命令行渲染
# quarto render 06_Quarto报告模板.qmd --to html
# quarto render 06_Quarto报告模板.qmd --to pdf
```

---

> 📧 报告生成时间：`r Sys.time()`  
> 🤖 本报告模板由 AI 辅助生成，从 R Markdown 迁移至 Quarto 格式
